benefits.description: 9kg (19.8 lbs) weight loss in 14 days; belly visibly shrinking and tighter; clothes fit noticeably better around waist and chest
Mirror changes ahead of scale; recomp feels real
Energy during overnight shifts has stayed surprisingly solid despite high physical demands
Appetite initially up after bumping SLU and 5-Amino, but controllable with protein shakes and water

side_effects.description: Fatigue experienced until dosages were lowered to current protocol
SLU-PP-332 with DMSO burns like mad when pinned too fast

protocol_notes: Home-reconstituted from raw powder except for retatrutide. Started at 156kg (344 lbs), 2 weeks later at 147kg (324 lbs). User works 12-hour overnight shifts 4-5 days/week, averages 14,000 steps daily, climbs stairs 2-3 times per hour, lifts/moves 50lb bags multiple times per hour. Practices intermittent fasting, consumes 300-350g protein daily, keeps carbs under 50g, takes natural supplements. Comments indicate user later dialed back dosages to 40mg 5-Amino and 20mg SLU after 3 weeks. Uses DMSO as solvent for SLU-PP-332. User states they started with 500mcg and titrated up slowly over time, though community expressed concern about rapid escalation.
